prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约78名，2024年最低位次约99名，呈逐年后移趋势，2024年较2023年后移约21名以2024年99名为最近基准位次；2023-2024年青海省理科计划均为2人；2026年物理类计划扩至4人，较2024年扩招100%，招生名额翻倍，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、 双一流建设高校，依托浙江大学（软科中国大学主榜第3名），医学学科实力位居全国顶尖行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风等事件；抖 音综合热度排名第14（高热），短视频平台曝光量大；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A-）、药学（A+）均为A类学科，其中药学为A+顶尖 水平，与招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学持续高热推荐，口腔医学推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度高；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人，较2025年基本持 平，理科考生规模稳定，；浙江大学医学院位于浙江杭州，非青海本省院校，跨省报考 需考虑地域偏好；该校在青海招生计划极少（仅2-4人），属于稀缺名额，竞争基数虽小但报考群体高度集中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次99名、2026年扩招100%至4人 、临床医学专业热度持续高热、青海省考生规模基本持平等因素：扩招大幅缓解竞争，但顶尖医学院的品牌效应和医学专业的高热度会吸引更多高分考生报考，部分抵消扩招效应 。预测2026年最低位次约138名，区间88-188名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（浙江杭州）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（浙江杭州）（智慧创新班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（浙江杭州）（含智能药学卓越班）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间88-188名内，建议以二档基础医学为主攻方向、一档临床医学为冲刺目标、三档药学为保底选择；位次明显优于区间上限（<88名）可重点冲刺临床医学王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（约188名）建议优先考虑药学保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 78, and in 2024 it was approximately 99, showing a trend of moving backward year by year. In 2024, it moved back about 21 places compared to 2023. The most recent baseline ranking is 99 in 2024. The science enrollment plan in Qinghai Province was 2 students for both 2023 and 2024. In 2026, the physics category plan expands to 4 students, a 100% increase compared to 2024, doubling the enrollment quota and significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, relying on Zhejiang University (ranked 3rd in the main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities). Its medical disciplines are among the top in the country. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct and teacher ethics. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 14th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Clinical Medicine (A), Basic Medicine (A-), and Pharmacy (A+) are all A-level disciplines, with Pharmacy at the A+ top level, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine continues to be highly recommended, Stomatology is recommended, and the overall application heat for medical majors is high. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, basically unchanged from 2025, with a stable number of science examinees. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, not a local institution in Qinghai, so cross-province application requires consideration of regional preferences. The school has very few enrollment quotas in Qinghai (only 2-4 students), making it a scarce opportunity. Although the competition base is small, the applicant group is highly concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 baseline ranking of 99, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 100% to 4 students, the sustained high heat of Clinical Medicine, and the basically stable number of examinees in Qinghai Province: the expansion significantly eases competition, but the brand effect of a top medical school and the high popularity of medical majors will attract more high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 138, with a range of 88-188.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Hangzhou, Zhejiang)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Basic Medicine (Hangzhou, Zhejiang) (Smart Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Hangzhou, Zhejiang) (Including Smart Pharmacy Excellence Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 88-188, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Basic Medicine as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 Pharmacy as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<88), you can focus on aiming for the flagship Clinical Medicine major. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (around 188), it is recommended to prioritize Pharmacy as a safety option.
